接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/update

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/update

接口描述

根据客户名称，更新客户信息

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS369","desc":"","maxLength":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"customerStatus","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%3A%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%8C0%EF%BC%9A%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"availableOrgType","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%200%EF%BC%9A%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%EF%BC%9B1%EF%BC%9A%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%2C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81"},"children":[]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS20231129090546","desc":"%20%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8D%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerName","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7api%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%953","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"unifiedCreditCode","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%9F%E4%B8%80%E4%BF%A1%E7%94%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"123456486785339896","desc":"","maxLength":"18"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contactName","required":false,"label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E6%80%A5%E6%80%A5%E6%80%A5","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contactPhone","required":false,"label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%B5%E8%AF%9D","exampleValue":"16000000000","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"email","required":false,"label":"%E9%82%AE%E7%AE%B1%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"123%40qq.com","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"companyWebsite","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%AE%98%E7%BD%91","exampleValue":"baidu.com","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"companyAddress","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%99%E6%B1%9F%E7%9C%81%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E%E5%B8%82","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"faxNumber","required":false,"label":"%E4%BC%A0%E7%9C%9F%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"123-456","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E8%BF%99%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"INFINITY_SELECT_103720543","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldValue","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldName","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E8%BF%99%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"multiValues","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%80%BC%E7%9A%84key","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B92","desc":""}}],"open":true}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"customerSeqId","label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID","exampleValue":"540","desc":"%20%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%A0%B9%E6%8D%AE%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80ID%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%EF%BC%8C%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%9B%B4%E6%96%B0"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"applyAllUser","maxLength":"5","label":"%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8Ctrue%20%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%20%20false%20%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%B9%B6%E4%B8%94%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%20%20%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customerGroups","label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E7%9A%84%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","maxLength":"8","required":true,"label":"%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%88%86%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%AD%E7%A7%8D%20EMPLOYEE%20%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%20%20%20DEPARTMENT%20%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%20%20%20POST%20%E5%B2%97%E4%BD%8D%20%20JOB%20%E8%81%8C%E4%BD%8D%20%20ROLE%20%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%20%20%20RANK%20%E8%81%8C%E7%BA%A7%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%8D%E5%9C%A8%E5%85%AD%E7%A7%8D%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%20%20%20%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"typeIdName","required":true,"maxLength":"200","label":"%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"00210416","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%82eg%EF%BC%9A%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88type%3A%20EMPLOYEE%EF%BC%89"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"body","label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"customerSeqId","label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80iD","exampleValue":"540"}}]}]}]}
